Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics

Class Substitution

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.Substitution
public class Substitution extends Object
This class decribes a substitution,which store a map(varMap) from quantifiable variable to a term(instance).
